---
title: "\'The Grottoes of Adelsberg and the Proteus Anguinus\'"
---

## \'The Grottoes of Adelsberg and the Proteus Anguinus\'

**Author:** W. H.
**Date:** 1866
**Imprint:** <i>MP</i> (May 1866) 459-70

### Notes

This article was evidently contributed by a friend of Susanna Warren\'s, and may be the work of her uncle William Henderson.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
